description_long: This object consists of a pair of gloves with a highly mechanical and reinforced design, featuring metallic exoskeleton elements integrated along the fingers, knuckles, and wrists. The gloves are primarily constructed from a brown, leather-like material, with visible seams and reinforced sections, especially around the knuckles and back of the hand. Metallic bands and articulated plates run along the length of the gloves, providing both protection and a mechanical aesthetic. Red accents and small patches of exposed material add visual interest and suggest areas of reinforcement or articulation. The fingertips are capped with metallic elements, and the wrists are encircled by robust, cylindrical metal cuffs with visible fasteners and structural supports. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty or specialized urban use, possibly for protection or augmentation.
description: A pair of brown, reinforced gloves with metallic exoskeleton elements, red accents, and robust wrist cuffs, designed for heavy-duty or specialized use.
description_view_0: Side view showing both gloves fully extended, highlighting the metallic exoskeleton, red accents, and detailed wrist cuffs.
description_view_1: End-on view focusing on the fingertips and the cylindrical structure of the wrist cuffs, with less detail visible on the glove surfaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the gloves' exoskeleton and reinforced knuckles from the other side.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite direction of view 1, showing the back of the gloves and the structure of the wrist cuffs.
